title: cirrus: skip windows/macos machine task on RHEL branches
body:
We already exclude the build jobs this is causing the machine tasks to fail as noticed in #23764. Given we do not need windows/macos testing for RHEL we have to skip them there.

While we try to only use only_if the problem here is that we would need to duplicate the big only_if_machine_test string and work the rhel condition into it which doesn't work with the current logic either so we would need to change the logic flow there which then doesn't work with our cirrus_yaml_test.py selftest. Therefore I think using skip here is easier.

CI failed, [podman-machine](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5254442025484288/html/machine-wsl-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-machine-init-windows-only-init-with-user-mode-networking--1), and I no longer look at podman-machine errors so I don't know if this is one of the usual flakes or not:
```
  Error: existing machine is too old, can't install user-mode networking dist until machine is reinstalled (using podman machine rm, then podman machine init)
```

> CI failed, [podman-machine](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5254442025484288/html/machine-wsl-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-machine-init-windows-only-init-with-user-mode-networking--1), and I no longer look at podman-machine errors so I don't know if this is one of the usual flakes or not:
> 
> ```
>   Error: existing machine is too old, can't install user-mode networking dist until machine is reinstalled (using podman machine rm, then podman machine init)
> ```

I have not seen this specific error before, looks like the real error is logged above though. Random windows errors when trying to delete the wsl machine.

Yeah okay I just see the same error now [in my own documentation-only PR](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6672420243767296/html/machine-wsl-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-machine-init-windows-only-init-with-user-mode-networking--1) so this is just another thing to ignore

> Yeah okay I just see the same error now [in my own documentation-only PR](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6672420243767296/html/machine-wsl-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-machine-init-windows-only-init-with-user-mode-networking--1) so this is just another thing to ignore

I am afraid this cannot be ignored, seeing the same failure in renovate PRs and after the retries...
Looking into the code this checks for a specific binary `/usr/libexec/podman/gvforwarder` in the wsl image when it throws this error, I fear the new wsl images might not longer contain this binary for some reason?
OK new wsl images made it pass, this is good for merge.
